case_title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW et al VS. CORAZON T SUNGA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW YORK, AS TRUSTE FOR THE CERTIFICATE HOLDERS CWMBS, INC., CHL MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH TRUST 2006-OA 5 MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2006-OA5 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNGA, CORAZON T THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 38 MIRAMAR AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
RENT DEPOSIT DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT SUNGA, LIZA (SUED AS DOE 1)

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW YORK, AS TRUSTE FOR THE CERTIFICATE HOLDERS CWMBS, INC., CHL MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH TRUST 2006-OA 5 MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2006-OA5 AS TO DEFENDANT SUNGA, CORAZON T DOES 1 TO X, INCLUSIVE

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SUNGA, LIZA (SUED AS DOE 1) ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION FILED BY DEFENDANT SUNGA, LIZA (SUED AS DOE 1)
